prs.title: Ch/additional auto populate fields

prs.rationale: Large addition of 1326 custom lines across 32 files implementing numerous new AI data-field collectors, BrightData integrations, and entrypoint updates representing a major expansion of the AI/data collection pipeline.

stories.name: Task Management & Collaboration System
stories.rationale: Built a complete task management system with inline editing, multi-assignee support, coach relationships, and a UI for coach assignment with auto-sync, enabling company-wide collaboration.

stories.name: Admin Queue Monitoring & User Management Tools
stories.rationale: Delivered admin tooling for monitoring job queues and managing users, giving operators visibility and control over platform activity.

stories.name: AI Agent Field Auto-Population Improvements
stories.rationale: Enhanced the AI collector and agents with additional auto-populated fields and incremental improvements to increase data capture accuracy during onboarding.

stories.name: Staging Environment & Onboarding Queue Setup
stories.rationale: Established the staging environment pipeline with Dockerfile improvements, environment variable handling, and wired up onboarding readiness job queuing for new users.

stories.name: Company Logo Display Reliability
stories.rationale: Improved company logo display by detecting broken images and falling back to domain-based logo resolution, ensuring a polished appearance across the platform.

stories.name: User Authentication & Account Reliability Fixes
stories.rationale: Improved authentication reliability by tracking last login timestamps and automatically confirming email on password reset to reduce account access friction.

stories.name: Email Notification & Terms and Conditions Update
stories.rationale: Added a user-facing email sent confirmation notification and updated the Terms & Conditions to keep users informed and compliant.

stories.name: Chat Message Formatting Fix
stories.rationale: Fixed HTML entity rendering in the initial system message to ensure clean, readable text in the chat interface.
